name: factiq
description: Answer economic and financial data questions with real data from FactIQ — publish shareable charts and reports, render terminal previews, or build bespoke local HTML visualizations.

interface.longDescription: Use FactIQ to answer economic and financial data questions with catalog search, read-only SQL, market data, earnings-call search, shareable charts, terminal previews, reports, and bespoke local HTML visualizations.
